case_title: DAVE JOHNSON VS. ZOLTAN ALEXANDER et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVE SERVED APR-30-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, ZOLTAN

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, ZOLTAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, ZOLTAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1215 LAGUNA STREET #403 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94115, ***INCLUDING ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS ON THE PREMISE.
